equips.equip_desc: The demon boots improve zhuxin's resilience when it comes to mana consumption, the clock of destiny provides mana, health and overall sustain! The genius wand reduces the enemy's magic defense allowing Zhuxin to deal more damage the longer her lantern is on the enemy. The sky piercer allows you to finish off low health enemies and steal some sneaky kills from your teammates along the way ;). The holy crystal offers magic power depending on Zhuxin's level; the higher the level, the more the magic damage! The wishing lantern is Zhuxin's signature weapon, the longer you continuously dish out damage, the more damage you will actually deal overall. It also gives a huge boost of mana as a plus!

hero.hero_overview: This build will improve all of Zhuxin's already defining qualities, it will provide her with qualities where she is lacking and improve what she is already amazing at.
hero.hero_strength: This build will provide her with plenty of mana to ensure that she never runs out just as long as you're able to manage it properly, it will also give her tons of burst damage to catch enemies off guard for outplays and control.
hero.hero_weakness: Of course, all builds have weaknesses, like for example items like athena's shield can block magic damage, and heroes like Lolita can hard-counter Zhuxin.

data.recommend: For all kinds of Zhuxin mains that want an easy build to follow!

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Tigreal provides excellent synergy through strong crowd control and reliable initiation. His ability to group enemies allows Zhuxin to deal maximum damage safely, making teamfights heavily favor their side. This is one of the best possible pairings for her.

Atlas offers powerful engage and lockdown, perfectly setting up Zhuxin's damage. His ultimate creates ideal conditions for her to control fights and punish grouped enemies. Together, they dominate objective fights like Turtle and Lord.

Khufra excels at disrupting mobile heroes that threaten Zhuxin. His crowd control and anti-dash mechanics protect her from assassins and give her space to deal damage. Slightly less reliable than Tigreal or Atlas, but still a strong synergy.

Estes greatly improves Zhuxin's survivability by keeping her healthy during extended fights. This synergy shines in slower, teamfight-oriented games where Zhuxin can continuously apply damage while being sustained.

Rafaela provides movement speed and healing, helping Zhuxin reposition and survive poke damage. While not as impactful as hard-engage tanks, she offers consistent support that works well in coordinated and poke-heavy compositions.

counters.counter_desc: Ling is one of the hardest counters to Zhuxin due to his extreme mobility and ability to bypass the frontline entirely. He can easily reach the backline, burst Zhuxin down, and disengage before she can respond. Without proper peel or Flicker timing, Zhuxin is very vulnerable against a good Ling player.

Lancelot's invincibility frames and high burst make him a major threat. He can dodge Zhuxin's skills and instantly punish her positioning during mid-game fights. While slightly easier to deal with than Ling due to cooldown windows, a skilled Lancelot can still shut Zhuxin down consistently.

Hayabusa excels at isolating targets, making Zhuxin an ideal victim if she is caught alone. His ultimate forces defensive item usage or Flicker, reducing Zhuxin's impact in teamfights. However, coordinated teams and good vision can lower his effectiveness.

Kaja is dangerous due to his suppress skill, which can instantly remove Zhuxin from a fight. His threat depends heavily on positioning and timing; if Zhuxin plays safely and stays behind her tank, his impact is manageable. Still, one mistake can be costly.

dominants.dominant_desc: Zhuxin plays the early game by focusing on safe wave clear, poke damage, and map awareness rather than forcing risky fights. Her goal is to maintain lane control, harass the enemy mid laner, and rotate efficiently to assist side lanes when opportunities arise. While her damage is respectable early on, Zhuxin should prioritize positioning and resource management, avoiding unnecessary deaths until her core item is completed. Smart rotations and steady pressure during this phase help set up her strong mid-game power spike.
dominants.dominant_title: Early Game: Lane Control & Safe Pressure

dominants.dominant_desc: Zhuxin reaches her strongest impact during the mid game, once her core item is completed and teamfights start to break out around objectives. At this stage, she has enough magic power and cooldown access to consistently pressure enemies, control key areas, and punish poor positioning. Zhuxin excels in skirmishes around Turtle, towers, and early Lord fights, where her sustained damage and zoning force enemies to either disengage or take heavy losses. While she remains effective in the late game, the mid game is where she dictates the tempo and gives her team the biggest advantage.
dominants.dominant_title: Dominant Phase: Mid-Game Control & Power Spike

dominants.dominant_desc: In the late game, Zhuxin transitions into a backline controller whose main role is to deal consistent damage while maintaining safe positioning. At this stage, enemies are more durable and teamfights are more punishing, making proper spacing and timing crucial. Zhuxin excels when she stays protected behind her frontline, continuously applying pressure and zoning enemies during Lord fights and base defenses. While she is no longer the sole damage dealer, her sustained magic damage and area control remain vital in deciding late-game engagements.
dominants.dominant_title: Late Game: Backline Control & Teamfight Presence

emblems.emblem_desc: The recommended Mage Emblem focuses on mobility, damage consistency, and mana sustain. In the first tier, take Agility to gain extra movement speed for faster rotations and safer positioning. For the second tier, choose Weapons Master, which increases the effectiveness of magic power gained from items and enhances Zhuxin's scaling into the mid and late game. As the core talent, Impure Rage is the best choice, as it provides additional damage based on the enemy's current HP while restoring mana, allowing Zhuxin to continuously pressure enemies during lane phase and extended teamfights.

As an alternative for Zhuxin, players can use a burst-oriented Mage Emblem that focuses on maximizing damage during early skirmishes and pick-offs. Choose Agility in the first tier for mobility and map presence, then take Bargain Hunter in the second tier to reduce item costs and allow faster access to core magic items. For the core talent, Lethal Ignition enhances Zhuxin's burst potential by dealing additional damage after landing multiple attacks on the same target, making it especially effective against squishy heroes and during early-to-mid game skirmishes.

equips.equip_desc: The Arcane Control Build is designed for consistency, scaling, and teamfight dominance. Clock of Destiny is the core item of this setup, providing essential magic power, mana, and survivability that allow Zhuxin to stay active in prolonged fights. It synergizes well with Impure Rage, enabling frequent skill usage and sustained damage throughout the game. Once the core item is secured, Lightning Truncheon and Genius Wand amplify her damage output, while Holy Crystal and Divine Glaive ensure she remains effective against both squishy and tanky enemies in the late game.

The Arcane Burst Build focuses on fast damage spikes and pick-off potential. Lightning Truncheon serves as the core item, significantly boosting Zhuxin's burst damage and helping her trigger Lethal Ignition more efficiently during combos. This allows her to eliminate squishy targets quickly in early and mid-game skirmishes. As the game progresses, Holy Crystal and Divine Glaive further enhance her burst, while Blood Wings provides additional magic power and survivability for late-game fights.

hero.hero_overview: Zhuxin is a high-impact mage who excels at controlling fights while dealing consistent magic damage throughout all stages of the game. She is strongest in the mid lane, where she can pressure enemies early, rotate efficiently, and dominate objectives with her area control. Unlike burst-only mages, Zhuxin remains relevant from early skirmishes to late-game teamfights, making her a reliable pick in both solo queue and coordinated play.
hero.hero_strength: Zhuxin's biggest strength lies in her balance of damage, control, and consistency. She can pressure lanes early, punish poor positioning, and heavily influence teamfights with her skills. Her ability to deal sustained magic damage while zoning enemies makes her extremely effective during Turtle and Lord fights. Additionally, Zhuxin does not rely on complex mechanics, allowing players to focus more on positioning and map awareness rather than execution-heavy combos.
hero.hero_weakness: Despite her strength, Zhuxin is vulnerable to hard engage and burst assassins if positioned poorly. She lacks strong escape tools, making her dependent on proper spacing and team protection. Zhuxin can also struggle against highly tanky compositions that stack magic defense early, reducing her damage impact if she falls behind. Good positioning and timing are crucial, as one mistake can quickly turn her into an easy target.

data.recommend: Play safe early, control the mid game, and let Zhuxin win the fight for you.

spell.spell_desc: For Zhuxin, Flicker is the most reliable and recommended battle spell, as it greatly improves her survivability and positioning in fights. Flicker allows Zhuxin to quickly reposition during teamfights, escape assassins, or adjust her angle to safely deal damage from the backline. Since Zhuxin lacks strong mobility skills, Flicker helps compensate for this weakness and enables safer rotations and objective control.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Perfect Match if Jungler can tank down incoming damges and deliver Zhuxin's control which makes the clash in team's favor
Clear lanes faster. Could potentially kill Mid laner or Roamer if enemy gets aggressive in Mid Lane

counters.counter_desc: Watch out for ambush. Kagura is good at bursting, which makes Zhuxin at disadvantage as it possibly can't escape once Kagura combo executed
Can make Hayabusa at disadvantage if correct battle spell and position used. Make sure to stay behind or close to Tank/Fighter if Hayabusa is active.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Clear Mid Lane. The most fundamental for mage in Mid Lane.
Bonus if the Roam clears with you.

Rotation:
 - After clearing Mid Lane (Should be Level 2 at this rate)
 - Before going to other lane after clearing, make sure the lane you're visiting is having an enemy playing aggressive towards that lane.

Gold Lane - If enemy is aggressive on Gold Lane, this is a perfect execution to visit Gold Lane after clearing. Make sure the Gold can fight and after going to Gold Lane, it makes enemy to consume either its Spell or Abilities to get out of battle. It helps the Gold Laner to clear its necessary objectives (Minions and/or Gold Crab). Best if the opponent has been taken down.

Exp Lane - If enemy Gold Lane plays safe, it is unecessary to visit Gold Lane as you can potentially steal gold and exp for your Gold Lane and make its lane in favor on enemy. Visit Exp Lane instead, this also makes the enemy Jungler, Roam, and Mid Laner visit Exp Lane which will give your Gold Lane a breather before turtle fight. A clash on Exp could result to takedown atleast two of their allies and turn the Turtle objective on your side. later on the game.

If the rotation results to early Level 4, you might give the last minion wave to the Roam before the Turtle spawns.

Turtle Fight - Be sure to zone out enemy together with your Roam, be sure to actively check the Turtle as enemy can slip-out and potentially steal the obj. Your job is to assist at zoning-out enemy but making sure Jungler securely take down Turtle.

emblems.emblem_desc:
As her mana easy to dry out, use this emblem set to take fights longer.

Agility - Additional movement speed would be great as this hero will be used for chasing enemy heroes. Can be changed with Firmness if needed extra defence

Pull Yourself Together - Makes Sprint or Flicker usage faster. As the hero will be great use for chase, reducing the cooldown of spell a great choice. Can be changed with Bargain Hunter to buy items early.

Impure Rage - This is one of the source of Zhuxin's mana. Together with her passive and Clock of Destiny, using Impure Rage makes the second skill usage longer and deal damage to the enemies especially with those high HP. Can be changed with Focusing Mark if the goal is to attribute a bonus damge towards opponent.

equips.equip_desc:
Demon Shoes - For Mana Regen.

Elegant Gem - Decent additional Mana + HP regen for early stages.

Sky Piercer - Build this after Elegant Gem, stacking this item early in the game, makes the hero monster even in late game. This is the source of damage and secure kills. Zhuxin can solo kill if used the passive correctly together with this item.

Glowing Wand - Less Health gains for Lifesteal and Regen. Burns enemy based on their HP

Wishing Lantern - To balance, use this for tanky enemies and provide damge to them.

Divine Glaive - Makes skill pierce through enemy Magic Defence, it gains Magic Pen.

data.recommend: Zhuxin | Knowing Hero Ability Guide - Mage

spell.spell_desc:
Sprint - Use this as main spell for this hero, it compliments with her 2nd skill together with her passive. It makes enemy unable to outrun and delivers a good CC towards them.

Flicker - Use this as secondary spell for this hero. If opponent choses an instant chase hero against this hero, Flicker could be a good use to change the tide of the battle. Good use against Hayabusa, Gusion, or even Fanny

hero.hero_overview: As a mage, Zhuxin excels in dealing sustained magic damage and providing crowd control. Her abilities allow her to manipulate battlefield positioning, making her a formidable presence in team fights. She is best utilized in the mid lane, where she can effectively manage minion waves and support her team
hero.hero_strength: In team fights, position yourself to maximize the area-of-effect damage from Lantern Flare and Crimson Beacon. Coordinate with teammates to capitalize on your crowd control abilities
hero.hero_weakness: She costs a lot of mana from the second skill when she use it on the enemy

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Zhuxin excels when paired with heroes who protect her, set up kills, or enhance her crowd control and poke damage.

counters.counter_desc: Zhuxin excels when paired with heroes who protect her, set up kills, or enhance her crowd control and poke damage.

dominants.dominant_desc:
✔ Poke and weaken enemies before the full fight starts.
✔ Use crowd control to slow and lift enemies, preventing them from escaping.
✔ Zone enemies with her ultimate, forcing them into bad positions.
✔ Stay safe and deal continuous magic damage.

Zhuxin is not a frontline fighter but a high-damage, backline mage who can control fights with her skills. Positioning and skill timing are key to maximizing her impact!

emblems.emblem_desc: Zhuxin is a mage who relies on poke damage and crowd control, so the best emblem choices focus on boosting her magic power, cooldown reduction, and mana sustain.

equips.equip_desc: Zhuxin relies on magic damage, poke, and crowd control, so her build should enhance magic power, cooldown reduction, and survivability.
No 1 zhuxin in Algeria

hero.hero_overview: Zhuxin, known as the "Beacon of Spirits," is a powerful mage in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang who excels in dealing magic damage and controlling enemies. She uses her Lantern of Spirits to unleash glowing butterflies, trapping enemies and dealing sustained magic damage. Her abilities allow her to manipulate the battlefield, slowing enemies, lifting them into the air, and creating dangerous zones that punish opponents who stay too close.
hero.hero_strength:
In the early and mid-game stages (levels 1-12): Focus on gathering gold and experience, as Zhuxin is weaker during this phase.

In the late-game stage (level 13 and above): Start roaming and ambushing enemies using the ultimate skill, especially when attacking from behind walls.
hero.hero_weakness:
✖ Squishy and easy to kill if caught.
✖ High mana consumption, requiring good resource management.
✖ Weak in the early game and needs farm to scale.
✖ Lacks strong mobility, making her vulnerable to assassins and crowd control.
Best Counters:

Assassins like Ling, Hayabusa, and Saber can quickly burst her down.

CC-heavy heroes like Franco, Kaja, and Selena can prevent her from casting abilities.

spell.spell_desc:
✔ Better Mobility: Zhuxin lacks strong escape tools, and Sprint helps her reposition quickly.
✔ Chase or Escape: Can be used to catch fleeing enemies or escape from assassins and CC-heavy heroes.
✔ Synergy with Skills: Works well with Fluttering Grace, allowing her to move faster while slowing enemies.
✔ Survivability in Team Fights: Helps her reposition when targeted, avoiding burst damage

equips.equip_desc:
Items:**
   - **Warrior Boots**: Provides additional physical attack and movement speed, along with a boost to physical defense against basic attacks.
   - **Bloodlust Axe**: Increases spell vamp, giving Zhou Xin sustainability in fights, along with a boost to his damage output.
   - **Blade of Despair**: A powerful item that increases physical attack significantly and provides a bonus damage effect against enemies with low health.
   - **Endless Battle**: Grants a mix of physical attack, lifesteal, and cooldown reduction, enhancing both his damage and survivability.
   - **Malefic Roar**: Offers high physical attack and armor penetration, making Zhou Xin more effective against tanky opponents.
   - **Immortal**: Provides a second chance in battles with its resurrection effect, along with additional physical attack and dura

hero.hero_overview:
Zhou Xin

### Classification:
- **Role**: mage
- **Type**:magical

### Abilities:

1. **First Skill - [Combat Skill]**:
   - Zhou Xin attacks enemies rapidly, dealing significant damage. He can use this skill to speed up his attacks.

2. **Second Skill - [Swift Movement]**:
   - Zhou Xin moves at high speed for a short duration, allowing him to escape from enemies or close in on them quickly.

3. **Third Skill - [Finishing Blow]**:
   - Zhou Xin delivers a powerful strike that damages enemies within a wide area. This skill is effective in team fights.

4. **Ultimate Skill - [Transformation]**:
   - Zhou Xin transforms into a stronger form, increasing his attack power and reducing damage taken for a limited time
hero.hero_strength:
Gameplay Strategies:
- It is preferable to use Zhou Xin at the front line during battles.
- He can deal a high amount of damage, so he should be at the heart of the fight.
- It is best to cooperate with heroes who can provide protection or support
hero.hero_weakness:
Weaknesses:

1. **Vulnerability to Crowd Control**:
   - Zhou Xin can be easily countered by heroes with strong crowd control abilities, such as stuns, slows, or immobilizations. These effects can prevent him from utilizing his mobility and damage potential.

2. **Reliance on Close Combat**:
   - As a fighter, Zhou Xin excels in close-range combat. This makes him susceptible to ranged attackers who can deal damage from a distance without engaging in direct confrontations.

3. **Squishiness**:
   - Depending on his build, Zhou Xin may not have high durability compared to tanks or other frontline heroes. This can make him an easy target if caught out of position.

4. **Skill Timing**:
   - His effectiveness relies on correctly timing his skills and positioning himself strategically. Mistiming his abilities can lead to missed opportunities and potential defeat in battles.

5. **Dependent on Team Support**:

spell.spell_desc:
### Sprint

- **Description**: Sprint allows the hero to move at an increased speed for a short duration. This spell is particularly useful for both offensive and defensive maneuvers, enabling players to chase down enemies or escape from dangerous situations.

- **Duration**: Typically lasts for around 3 seconds, providing a significant boost to movement speed.

- **Cooldown**: The cooldown for Sprint is usually around 60 seconds, making it essential to use it wisely during critical moments in the game.

### Effects:
- **Increased Movement Speed**: When activated, Sprint significantly increases the hero's movement speed, allowing for faster repositioning on the battlefield.
- **Chase or Escape**: This spell is ideal for chasing down fleeing enemies or escaping from tight situations where you're at risk of being d

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Zhuxin and Carmilla synergize well. Carmilla's ability to tether to allies and deal damage provides excellent support for Zhuxin, enhancing her survivability during engagements.  Carmilla's crowd control and sustain allow Zhuxin to safely deal damage from a distance, while Carmilla's tether helps Zhuxin escape if necessary.  Both heroes benefit from a team-fight oriented strategy and can effectively control the battlefield together.

counters.counter_desc: Cecilion counters Zhuxin. Cecilion's sustained magic damage and high mobility allow him to easily harass and kite Zhuxin, who is relatively immobile and fragile.  Zhuxin's crowd control abilities are less effective against Cecilion due to his ability to sustain and avoid direct confrontation.  Zhuxin struggles to deal significant damage to Cecilion before being overwhelmed by his consistent damage output.

dominants.dominant_desc: Prioritize last hitting minions to maximize gold income. Use your second skill to poke enemies and harass them from a safe distance.  In team fights, use your ultimate to initiate or disrupt the enemy team. Prioritize targeting high-value targets like marksmen or mages.  Use your lantern to control the battlefield and create opportunities for your team to secure kills.  Be mindful of your positioning, as Zhuxin is fragile and easily targeted.  Coordinate with your team to ensure you have support during team fights.
dominants.dominant_title: Zhuxin's early game is weak. Focus on farming and avoiding unnecessary risks.

emblems.emblem_desc: This emblem set focuses on enhancing Zhuxin's mobility and damage output while optimizing her mana management.  Agility boosts movement speed, crucial for repositioning during fights and maximizing the effectiveness of her skill-based attacks. Bargain Hunter reduces item costs, allowing for faster build completion and earlier access to crucial items that enhance her mana regeneration and damage.  While the provided text doesn't explicitly recommend Quantum Charge,  it's a viable option for mana sustain and additional survivability, complementing her already high base mana and mana regeneration.

equips.equip_desc: This Zhuxin build prioritizes magic power, mana sustain, and survivability.  Arcane Boots provide movement speed and magic penetration. Sky Piercer boosts magic penetration further, maximizing damage output. Clock of Destiny increases magic power and mana regeneration over time, enhancing sustained damage. Glowing Wand adds magic power and magic penetration, while also providing a burn effect. Wishing Lantern offers additional magic power and mana regeneration, crucial for consistent ability usage. Finally, Blood Wings increase both magic power and physical defense, significantly improving Zhuxin's survivability in team fights.

hero.hero_overview: Zhuxin, the Beacon of Spirits, is a mage hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang. She is known for her unique abilities that involve controlling enemies with her lantern and ember butterflies. Zhuxin excels in the mid lane and is a powerful damage dealer with crowd control capabilities. Her abilities allow her to manipulate the flow of battle, turning the tide in her team's favor
hero.hero_strength: Zhuxin's main strength lies in her crowd control abilities, particularly her lantern flare skill. This skill allows her to capture and throw enemies, disrupting enemy formations and creating opportunities for her team to secure kills. She also excels in the early game, thanks to her ability to spam her second skill early on, which can significantly damage and displace enemies. Zhuxin's high base mana and mana regeneration from her passive allow her to sustain her ability usage and remain a powerful force in team fights
hero.hero_weakness: Zhuxin's main weakness is her fragility. As a mage, she has low durability and can be easily taken down by burst damage from assassins or fighters. Additionally, she lacks mobility, making her vulnerable to ganks and difficult to escape from aggressive heroes. Zhuxin is also weak in the early game, struggling to clear waves effectively and dealing minimal damage. Her reliance on her ultimate, which has a long cooldown, makes her vulnerable during the early stages of the game.

data.recommend: This guide provides a comprehensive overview of Zhuxin, a powerful mage hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker allows Zhuxin to instantly teleport a short distance, providing her with a much needed escape tool or a way to close the gap on enemies. It is a versatile spell that can be used both offensively and defensively.

hero.hero_overview: Zhuxin... A young women who can be seen wandering the night in zhu'an with a lantern in her hand. She posses the ability to summon ember butterflies... She's know as a mid lanee but due to her incredible cc and burst damage I'd play her in Both mid lane aswell as exp lane. Other roles for her I wouldn't recommend.
hero.hero_strength:
Zhuxin excels in releasing heavy cc upon enemies with her second skill. Giving her abnormal speed for a short amount of  time with her first skill making escaping more easy and her ultimate enabling a easier touch to bring her enemies airborne and back down to burst them to their demise. I would recommend the following 3 builds for her for different reasons
1. You go bye bye (a burst damage build depending if there are many squishy heroes. The passive of both lightning truncheon and blood wings make durability and speed for zhuxin makes escaping easier. Combine with holy crystal a d sky scraper to burst them down. Mana consumption: mid. Damage:high)
.demon boots
.lightning truncheon   
.sky piercer
.holy crystal 
.blood wings
.wishing lantern
2. Seems harder than it gets (situations change from time to time in a match and this build I recommend against heavy sweats or tanky heroes. Combine the defence from clock of dynasty and the passive of blood wings survival and speed makes it easier for zhuxin. Combine Ice queen wand  and it makes it harder for any Melee or even long range heroes to escape. Damage: mid. Mana consumption: mid)
. demon boots
. Clock of Destiny 
.sky piercer
.blood wings
.wishing lantern
.ice queen wand
3. Harder to hit. (This build is mainly for exp but it can also be played in mid. This makes it harder for enemy's to kill zhuxin and Regen is harder for enemies. These are the main core items that give zhuxin the ability to withstand hardcore enemies aswell as maintaining a bit of damage.  Damage: low but can adapt. Mana consumption: low)
.tough boots
.clock of dynasty 
.dominance ice
.blood wings
.wishing lantern 
.Anything else of your choice depending on situation 

Emblem: mage/fighter with:
.agility
.bargain hunters
.impure rage.
 Battle spells:
HIGHLY recommend sprint (I've faced zhuxin users with flicker and it actually gets useless in the late game but sprint can go a long way )
hero.hero_weakness:
Zhuxin is highly weak against cc. She can't do much if she is she is caught it one particular cc. She is also weak against slow effects like ice queen wand or corrosion scythe. Be extra vigilant when clearing minion waves and know when to  freeze an enemies lane and when to not because zhuxin can be come vulnerable without atleast lvl 4 and her battle spell. She's highly vulnerable when she thinks she can quickly eliminate a problematic hero but I'm general she can be eliminated easily.
She's bad against heroes with high agility and that can go immune to her cc or remove cc effects as well as heroes getting near her. If u need anything else lemme know 💖

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Zhuxin membutuhkan rekan dengan kemampuan CC yang kuat, dan Tigreal adalah pilihan terbaik untuk itu. Dengan skill ultimate imploison, Tigreal mampu menarik banyak musuh ke satu area, memudahkan Zhuxin untuk mengaktifkan skill Lantern Flare atau ultimate Crimson Beacon. Serangan ini menciptakan kombinasi mematikan yang membuat lawan tidak berkutik.

Kunci dari kombinasi ini adalah komunikasi dan eksekusi yang tepat. Tigreal harus memastikan waktu yang pas untuk melancarkan ultimate-nya, memberikan ruang bagi zhuxinn untuk mengeluarkan AoE besar-besaran yang bisa membalikkan keadaan Tim

counters.counter_desc:
Hayabusa merupakan Hero assassin yang memiliki mobilitas dan skill damge yang tinggi. Dia juga dapat menjadi Hero counter Zhuxin yang dapat kalian andalkan 

Hal yang membuat Hayabusa menjadi Hero counter Zhuxin terbaik adalah kemampuan nya untuk melarikan diri dari Lantern snare atau Crimson Beacon dengan cepat mengunakan 
Ninjutsu: Quad Shadow

Jike terjebak didalam crowd control, Hayabusa dapat mengunakan Ougi: Shadow Kill agar tidak dapat ditargetkan oleh musuh, sekaligus memberikan damage secara bersamaan

dominants.dominant_desc:
Zhuxin's Game Strategy in Early Game and Late Game.
In the early game phase, Zhuxin needs to focus on farming and collecting soul snare stacks.
Use the Fluttering Grace skill to provide continuous attacks to slowly reduce the opponent's HP.
Don't be too aggressive, because Zhuxin is vulnerable if caught by the Assassin Hero when he doesn't have the skills to escape.

If you have entered the Late Game phase and Zhuxin can already produce great damage. Use the Lantern Flare skill to catch enemies, and the ultimate Crimson Beacon to lock the opponent's movement within the magic damage area.
dominants.dominant_title: Make sure your position is safe when using Zhuxin and not too close to the front line.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Pilihan pertama pada emblem adalah Impure Rage.
Impure Rage memang cocok untuk zhuxin 
Soalnya, emblem ini dapat memberikan damage skill tambahan yang disertai dengan pemulihan mana.jadi, untuk pegangan early hingga late game, zhuxin cukup aman

Pilihan kedua yang tepat buat digunakan kepada Zhuxin adalah Bargain Hunter.emblem ini memang tidak memberikan efek terhadap pengguna nya. Namun, Bargain Hunter bisa memberikan pengurangan harga equipment yang nantinya pembelian item bisa jadi jauh lebih cepat ketimbang Hero lawan

Sedangkan Agility menjadi pilihan terakhir, karena dapat membantu pergerakan karena adanya 4% movement speed tambahan.selain dari sepatu, kecepatan pergerakan juga bakal dapat dari emblem ini

equips.equip_desc:
Demon Boots:"zhuxin cukup boros kalau soal mana. Maka dari itu, sepatu ini cukup dibutuhkan karena dapat memberikan +10 mana regen

Clock Of Destiny:"Item ini dapat memberikan damage lewat magic power, HP ,dan tambahan mana. Selain atribut dasar, item ini juga punya keuntungan sendiri lewat pasif uniknya.

Dominance Ice:"Zhuxin membutuhkan item defense karena rentan jadi incaran lawan, Dominance Ice dapat memberikan Physical defense dan movement speed, item ini juga bisa meningkatkan tambahan mana

Ice Queen Wand:"memberikan efek slow kepada musuh, memudahkan Zhuxin menangkap lawannya"

Divine Glaive:"atribut unik dari item ini bisa memberikan peningkatan+40% magic penetration."

Blood Wings:"Blood Wings dapat memberikan pertahanan melalui Shield yang dapat membantu kinerja teamfight. Bukan hanya Shield, efek dari item ini juga memberikan movement speed tambahan."

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Zhuxin work best with tanks, such as bekerick, aldous. Which can prtoect her from direct hit. Also zhuxin can work with jungler who can finish enemy in in one shot, like saber, alucard, karina.

counters.counter_desc: Zhuxin can be counter by sun, dyroth, because of their high chasing ability. Zhuxin can't escape them. Enemies with high chasing mobility is a threat fkr her.

dominants.dominant_desc: Start by helping jungler and clear the first minion wave to reach level 2. Then rotate to gold or xp lane to harass enemy and help to get ur xp laner or gold laner to secure a kill to boost their gold/xp. Then again come back to lane and wait until level 4. When the level is  4 and ultimate unlocked, help your jungler to secure kills or help your mm and tank to secure kills and get some kills by own. Since mm are weak in early game zhuxin can easily 1v1 them. In mid game help in turtle and team fight, follow your tank/support to harass enemies. Keep an eye on map to get kill from lone heroes. In the late game zhuxin can harass enemy by her second kill and help team mates to secure the kills.

emblems.emblem_desc: She needs more movement to escape a situation since she has no specific cc. Also she needs some magic defense and a damage boost.

equips.equip_desc: Sky piercer for quick kill. Clock of destiny is great for some healing. Blood wing can boost her movement and shield. Healing reduction is helpful to go against enemy hero. And lantern for killing tanks.

hero.hero_overview: Zhuxin is a meta mage for a long time. Zhuxin is known for her annoying second skill which can lift an enemy hero and throw. Zhuxin has slow damage in early game and she can't kill an enemy in one shot. However, for her annoyin ability its still meta.
hero.hero_strength: Zhuxin strength is she has annoying ability to harass enemy. She can stop enemy from escaping and can assist in killing. Enemies are generally be worried about pushing because of zhuxin. Its hard to escape zhxin second skill.
hero.hero_weakness: Her recent nerf makes her kinda weak. Her first skill is not that much unique and eyecatching something. She lacks high burst damage so she cant counter heroes like layla, granger in late game, because zhuxin cant kill an enemy in one shot. She needs time to harass and kill an enemy. But in late game layla and granger can easily kill her before she kill one. She cant 1 v1 them that much easily like other mage can (eg: edura, kagura,pharsa,kadita,cecilion etc). She needs something cc or other thing to be in the meta again.

data.recommend: Zhuxin is a hero which need patience to master. So practice more.
data.title: Zhuxin is weak
